name: electricity-bill-management
description: Full-stack electricity bill management system — Next.js client + Express/MySQL API

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c yellow,cyan "npm start --prefix server" "npm start --prefix client"
